Business.title: George Goodman’s investing wisdom: Why sometimes the best move is to do nothing
Business.summary: George Goodman's classic book highlights investor psychology over pure logic. He stressed knowing oneself and avoiding crowd mentality for better decisions. Goodman's insights remain relevant for navigating today's volatile financial markets.
